# PHImageRequestOptionsVersion.current

**Case**

Request the most recent version of the image asset (the one that reflects all edits).

## Declaration

```swift
case current
```

## Discussion

The resulting image is the rendered output from all previously made adjustments.

## Constants

- **PHImageRequestOptionsVersion.unadjusted**: Request a version of the image asset without adjustments.
- **PHImageRequestOptionsVersion.original**: Request the original, highest-fidelity version of the image asset.
